name: @aie-matrix/server
description: Combined PoC dev process (Colyseus, world-api, registry, auth). Wire scripts per RFC-0001.

scripts.predev: pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/root-env run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/shared-types run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-auth run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-colyseus run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-registry run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-world-api run build
scripts.prestart: pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/root-env run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/shared-types run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-auth run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-colyseus run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-registry run build && pnpm --filter @aie-matrix/server-world-api run build && pnpm run build
